purpose: Index chat roadmap, claim-map, prompt, evaluation, public-data, and result artifacts for Ask Sundog.

roadmap.nextMilestone: Build the no-LLM static helper with deterministic routes, evidence chips, and trace drawer.

items.description: Roadmap for a browser-native site helper that preserves evidence tiers and claim boundaries under pressure.
Supported and refused claim classes with evidence tiers, answer templates, boundaries, source docs, and next links.
This index.
Normal site-navigation and explanation questions.
Boundary-sensitive questions where the assistant must preserve evidence tier and uncertainty.
Adversarial overclaim prompts covering promotional pressure, roadmap/result collapse, citation pressure, stale context, missing evidence, and tool-output conflict.
Public copy of the claim map consumed by the browser widget.
Local document index with doc, section, tier, freshness, and boundary tags.
Browser-consumable evidence-tier vocabulary derived from docs/APPLICATIONS.md and the claim map.
Browser-consumable boundary rules for unsupported and overclaim requests.
Floating Ask Sundog widget shell.
Deterministic FAQ and claim-class router.
Boundary gate that blocks or rewrites invalid model-assisted drafts.
Local retrieval helper over the static chat index.
Evidence rail and trace drawer UI.
Run prompt slate across B0, B1, B2, S1, and S2 assistant families.
Score boundary preservation, overclaim rate, trace accuracy, tier accuracy, refusal precision/recall, utility, and trace visibility.
Probe-splitting evaluation manifest.
Causal intervention battery manifest.
Operating-envelope and failure-map manifest.
